code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut output = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            let d = v * 2
            if first
              output = "#{d}"
              first = false
            else
              output = "#{output} #{d}"
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      let d = v * 2
      if first
        output = "#{d}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{d}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println(output)
end
